title: Workflows
subtitle: Step-by-step recipes you can launch in one click or schedule to run automatically. Pick a workflow, choose your engine, and the agent will walk you through it.

search.emptyLibrary: No workflows loaded yet. The bundled library will populate at next restart.

bodyFallback: The agent loads this workflow as its first directive and walks you through it step by step. You can interrupt or change direction at any point.

launch.placeholder: Launch wiring is in flight. Soon you will pick an engine (Wayland Core / Gemini / Claude / Codex), and the workflow will load as the agent's first directive in a fresh chat.

schedule.placeholder: Schedule wiring lands in the next pass — the Create Scheduled Task modal will gain a "From workflow" tab and open here pre-filled with this workflow. For now, open Scheduled Tasks in the sidebar and paste the workflow as the prompt.
